title: safety.viz participant-profile data contract
description: Long-format lab data: one record per participant per measure per visit/day — the same contract the hep-explorer consumes, so the docked mount can read a host chart's already-cleaned rows verbatim (PPRF-1). Column names are supplied by the settings mapping; the standalone mount standardizes each value to ×ULN and ×Baseline, matches the key liver measures from the measure column via measure_values, and removes missing/non-numeric results with a reported count. The docked mount skips ingest entirely and is fed pre-cleaned rows imperatively.

data.description: d3.csv()-style records; every row carries the participant, measure, result, and ULN columns named in settings, one row per participant per measure per visit/day.

settings.description: Column mappings and rendering options; merged onto the module's DEFAULT_SETTINGS, so only overrides need to be supplied.

id_col.description: Participant identifier column; the profile renders one participant at a time and steps through a multi-participant selection (PPRF-1, PPRF-5).

measure_col.description: Column holding the measure name; required in data. Matched to the ALT/AST/TB/ALP keys via measure_values (PPRF-3).

value_col.description: Column holding the numeric result; required in data. Non-numeric results are removed with a reported count (PPRF-1).

unit_col.description: Optional unit column, carried onto measure labels and spark points.

normal_col_high.description: Upper limit of normal (ULN); required in data — the ×ULN standardization divides each value by it, and it feeds the outlier-high flag (PPRF-4).

normal_col_low.description: Optional lower limit of normal; the sparkline band floor and the outlier-low flag (PPRF-4).

studyday_col.description: Study-day column; the x-axis of the labs-over-time spaghetti and the expanded inset (PPRF-3, PPRF-4).

visit_col.description: Visit-name column, carried onto spark points and tooltips.

visitn_col.description: Numeric visit column, the fallback ordering when no study day exists.

baseline_col.description: Optional baseline-flag column; when null, the earliest record per measure is the baseline for the ×Baseline display (PPRF-3).

baseline_value.description: The value of baseline_col that marks the baseline record.

details.description: Header demographics: column names or { value_col, label } specs rendered as label/value pairs in the participant header (PPRF-2).

measure_values.description: Map of the short measure key (ALT/AST/TB/ALP) to the full measure string in the data (PPRF-3).

cuts.description: Per-measure reference cutpoints keyed by measure then display mode; a `defaults` entry back-fills any measure without its own cuts — the spaghetti's dashed reference lines (PPRF-3).

measureBounds.description: Population-extent quantiles drawn as band guides behind each sparkline and the expanded inset (PPRF-4).

participantProfileURL.description: Optional link-out URL for the header; every literal `{id}` token is replaced with the URL-encoded participant id (PPRF-2, closes #53).

p_alt_col.description: Optional column carrying a pre-computed P_ALT; passed through where present, never computed client-side (PPRF-2).

listing.description: Whether to render the participant's raw records in the shared listing under the measure table (PPRF-4).

listen_to.description: Standalone event target (Element or selector) the module listens to for participantsSelected; null listens on document. The profile never dispatches selection events of its own (PPRF-6).

filters.description: Filter specs normalized for the shared reducers' settings shape; the profile renders no filter controls of its own.

groups.description: Group specs normalized for the shared reducers' settings shape.
